CustomField.description:
Validates if the record should be marked for sync to Marketing Cloud or not. (Automations sets the field SyncWithMc__c).
Sync only the MembershipBenefits that is connected to the members most recent membership (even if status is .
CustomField.formula: NOT(ISBLANK(Person__c)) && NOT(ISBLANK(Membership__c)) && Membership__r.MC_validator__c = true && Membership__r.SenasteMedlemskap__c = true
CustomField.label: Synkad med Marketing Cloud
